parsed_review.summary: CP00-359 is a faithful descriptor-only slice covering exactly the 10 planned RP11 units (RP11.P07.M06.S15-RP11.P07.M07.S04): the M06 Synthetic Fixture Set failure tail (6 rows) and the M07 Test And Golden Case Set head (4 rows), mirroring the verified CP356-358 pattern. Verified via Read/Grep/Glob only. (1) Coverage: deliverable distribution {hermes_evidence:2,fixture:1,test:2,security_audit:1,failure_recovery:4} and micro-title split {Synthetic Fixture Set:6,Test And Golden Case Set:4} match the baseline, requirements constant, and validateTimeExpenseCoreCp359Coverage. (2) No-write/no-runtime/no-leak boundaries: freezeCp359Result sets all runtime/write flags false and leak guards safe; validateTimeExpenseCoreCp359FailureFixtureSliceDescriptor enforces per-row descriptor_only/runtime_execution:false/customer_safe_errors_only/raw_payload_included:false plus inherited guards (blocked_claim_detail_included:false, real_client_data_loaded:false, executes_unit_test_runtime_paths:false, dispatches_integration_smoke_runtime:false, audit_hint_detail_included:false, emits_hermes_runtime_receipt:false, expected_outcome rejected_customer_safe), all resolving through the row-extras chain. (3) Authority boundary preserved: claude_is_final_approval:false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust:false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening:true; no_write_attestation promotes_claude_to_final_approval:false and claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation:false. (4) Hermes is descriptor/evidence-only (H11 packet string + no_hermes_runtime_receipt), not product runtime. (5) Tests (model.test.js) assert coverage.valid, slice.valid, no-leak guards, and authority boundary; the self-validating contract script asserts contract current_pack/no_write_attestation/cp359_requirements/failure_fixture_slice_descriptor deepEqual and production_ready_candidate true; index.js wildcard-re-exports surface the 7 public exports; command-evidence records all implementation/plan/repo validations at exit 0. (6) production_ready is correctly false (runtime_ready false); the production_ready_flag is a descriptor-verification token, so no production_ready gate is weakened. (7) changed-file-scope correctly separates unrelated dirty files (LDIP invalid-attempt, workbook/matter docs) from the pack. Auth-preflight returned valid non-empty JSON; no malformed/auth-failed/tool-call-shaped review evidence is present or accepted. Claude remains a read-only independent reviewer, not final approver. No P0/P1/P2 issues found; one P3 informational note on expected post-review artifacts. Recommend PASS; final enterprise-trust approval remains a human decision outside this receipt.

findings.title: Three forward-declared pack evidence artifacts not yet present (expected pre-review state)
findings.details: manifest.json lists required_pack_artifacts/evidence_refs including docs/closeout-packs/cp00-359/claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json, but only manifest.json and command-evidence.json currently exist on disk. This matches the documented hardening_sequence (read_only_claude_run_raw_capture -> normalize -> receipt_validate -> finding_adjudication -> construction_inspection -> final_closeout_validation -> commit): the three artifacts are produced downstream of this read-only review run, so their absence now is expected and not a defect. pack_level_claude_review.status is correctly 'pending' with empty valid_review_receipts/invalid_review_attempts.
findings.recommendation: Ensure the remaining hardening steps generate claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json (derived from this accepted review) before the gated closeout commit, and re-run npm run closeout-pack:validate so the required_pack_artifacts set is fully materialized prior to human final approval.
findings.post_review_disposition: informational_expected_no_action_blocking; verify artifacts exist at final_closeout_validation step
